req.title: Session management
req.statement: A user session shall expire after 30 minutes of inactivity; expired sessions shall redirect to login.

doc.reasoning: R-WEB-111 defines a 30-minute inactivity timeout. Four distinct test conditions emerge: (1) a session that idles well beyond 30 min must be invalidated and redirect to login (EP positive); (2) a session active within 30 min must remain valid (NEG negative – no expiry); (3) the exact 30-minute boundary must trigger expiry (BVA boundary); (4) an already-expired session that issues a direct API call must receive HTTP 401 (STC state transition – this is a positive test confirming the correct system behaviour when traversing the authenticated->expired->unauthorised state path, as defined in the error_pathways). Tests manipulate time via a server-side clock-override helper or a mock to keep wall-clock runtime acceptable. Each test logs in fresh, manipulates idle time, then asserts redirect URL and/or response status.

tests.name: test_session_expires_after_30min_inactivity
preconditions: Server supports X-Override-Clock header or equivalent clock-freeze mechanism
actions: Authenticate and obtain a valid session cookie
Advance server clock by 31 minutes via <clock_override_helper>
Issue GET /* with the stale session cookie
Observe final URL and HTTP status
expected: Response status is 302 or final page URL contains /login
Session cookie is cleared or expired in Set-Cookie header
trace: R-WEB-111: session shall expire after 30 minutes of inactivity
R-WEB-111: expired sessions shall redirect to login
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "<BASE_URL>"
LOGIN_ENDPOINT = "<LOGIN_ENDPOINT>"
PROTECTED_PATH = "/dashboard"
CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT = "<clock_advance_endpoint>"


@pytest.fixture()
def authenticated_session():
    return <get_authenticated_session_fixture>(BASE_URL, LOGIN_ENDPOINT)


def test_session_expires_after_30min_inactivity(authenticated_session):
    session, cookies = authenticated_session

    adv = requests.post(
        CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT,
        json={"advance_seconds": 1860},
        headers={"X-Test-Control": "1"},
    )
    assert adv.status_code == 200, "Clock advance failed"

    resp = session.get(
        BASE_URL + PROTECTED_PATH,
        cookies=cookies,
        allow_redirects=True,
    )

    assert "/login" in resp.url, (
        f"Expected redirect to /login, got {resp.url}"
    )

    requests.post(
        CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT,
        json={"reset": True},
        headers={"X-Test-Control": "1"},
    )

tests.name: test_session_remains_valid_before_30min_inactivity
actions: Authenticate and obtain a valid session cookie
Advance server clock by 29 minutes (below expiry threshold)
Issue GET /* with the session cookie
trace: R-WEB-111: session shall expire AFTER 30 minutes (not before)
Negative path: inactivity below threshold must not invalidate session
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "<BASE_URL>"
LOGIN_ENDPOINT = "<LOGIN_ENDPOINT>"
PROTECTED_PATH = "/dashboard"
CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT = "<clock_advance_endpoint>"


@pytest.fixture()
def authenticated_session():
    return <get_authenticated_session_fixture>(BASE_URL, LOGIN_ENDPOINT)


def test_session_remains_valid_before_30min_inactivity(authenticated_session):
    session, cookies = authenticated_session

    adv = requests.post(
        CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT,
        json={"advance_seconds": 1740},
        headers={"X-Test-Control": "1"},
    )
    assert adv.status_code == 200, "Clock advance failed"

    resp = session.get(
        BASE_URL + PROTECTED_PATH,
        cookies=cookies,
        allow_redirects=True,
    )

    assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Unexpected status {resp.status_code}"
    assert "/login" not in resp.url, (
        f"Unexpected redirect to login at {resp.url}"
    )

    requests.post(
        CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT,
        json={"reset": True},
        headers={"X-Test-Control": "1"},
    )

tests.name: test_session_expires_at_exact_30min_boundary
preconditions: Server idle timeout is configured to exactly 1800 seconds
actions: Authenticate and obtain a valid session cookie
Advance server clock by exactly 1800 seconds (30 minutes)
Issue GET /* with the session cookie
Observe final URL and HTTP status
expected: Session is invalidated at the exact boundary value
trace: R-WEB-111: boundary at exactly 30 minutes of inactivity
BVA: on-boundary value 1800 s must trigger expiry
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "<BASE_URL>"
LOGIN_ENDPOINT = "<LOGIN_ENDPOINT>"
PROTECTED_PATH = "/dashboard"
CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT = "<clock_advance_endpoint>"
IDLE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 1800


@pytest.fixture()
def authenticated_session():
    return <get_authenticated_session_fixture>(BASE_URL, LOGIN_ENDPOINT)


def test_session_expires_at_exact_30min_boundary(authenticated_session):
    session, cookies = authenticated_session

    adv = requests.post(
        CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT,
        json={"advance_seconds": IDLE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS},
        headers={"X-Test-Control": "1"},
    )
    assert adv.status_code == 200, "Clock advance failed"

    resp = session.get(
        BASE_URL + PROTECTED_PATH,
        cookies=cookies,
        allow_redirects=True,
    )

    session_expired = ("/login" in resp.url) or (resp.status_code in (401, 403))
    assert session_expired, (
        f"Session should be expired at boundary; url={resp.url} status={resp.status_code}"
    )

    requests.post(
        CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT,
        json={"reset": True},
        headers={"X-Test-Control": "1"},
    )

tests.name: test_expired_session_api_call_returns_401
preconditions: An API endpoint protected by session auth is known
actions: Advance server clock by 31 minutes to expire the session
Issue a direct API GET request using the expired session token
Record HTTP status code of the response
expected: Response body contains an error indicating session expiry or unauthorised
trace: R-WEB-111: error pathway - 401 on next request after session expiry
STC: authenticated -> expired -> unauthorised state transition confirms correct system behaviour
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "<BASE_URL>"
LOGIN_ENDPOINT = "<LOGIN_ENDPOINT>"
API_PROTECTED_ENDPOINT = "<api_protected_endpoint>"
CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT = "<clock_advance_endpoint>"


@pytest.fixture()
def authenticated_session():
    return <get_authenticated_session_fixture>(BASE_URL, LOGIN_ENDPOINT)


def test_expired_session_api_call_returns_401(authenticated_session):
    session, cookies = authenticated_session

    adv = requests.post(
        CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT,
        json={"advance_seconds": 1860},
        headers={"X-Test-Control": "1"},
    )
    assert adv.status_code == 200, "Clock advance failed"

    resp = session.get(
        BASE_URL + API_PROTECTED_ENDPOINT,
        cookies=cookies,
        allow_redirects=False,
    )

    assert resp.status_code == 401, (
        f"Expected 401 for expired session, got {resp.status_code}"
    )

    requests.post(
        CLOCK_ADVANCE_ENDPOINT,
        json={"reset": True},
        headers={"X-Test-Control": "1"},
    )
